name: Marcus & Millichap, Inc.
description: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. is a leading commercial real estate brokerage firm specializing in investment sales, financing, research, and advisory services. Founded in 1971, the company revolutionized the industry by popularizing the practice of listing properties exclusively with one brokerage firm. With a vast network of offices across the United States and Canada, Marcus & Millichap leverages proprietary technology and a highly trained team of investment specialists to match commercial properties with a broad pool of qualified buyers, helping institutional and private investors maximize value and achieve their financial objectives.
